Bash(python -c "
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

print\('=== LOADING FILES ==='\)
menu = pd.read_excel\('mcdonalds_menu.xlsx'\)
orders = pd.read_excel\('mcdonalds_orders.xlsx'\)

print\('\\n--- MENU FILE ---'\)
print\(f'Shape: {menu.shape}'\)
print\(f'Columns: {list\(menu.columns\)}'\)
print\(f'\\nDtypes:\\n{menu.dtypes}'\)
print\(f'\\nFirst 5 rows:\\n{menu.head\(\)}'\)
print\(f'\\nLast 3 rows:\\n{menu.tail\(3\)}'\)
print\(f'\\nNull counts:\\n{menu.isnull\(\).sum\(\)}'\)

print\('\\n\\n--- ORDERS FILE ---'\)
print\(f'Shape: {orders.shape}'\)
print\(f'Columns: {list\(orders.columns\)}'\)
print\(f'\\nDtypes:\\n{orders.dtypes}'\)
print\(f'\\nFirst 5 rows:\\n{orders.head\(\)}'\)
print\(f'\\nLast 3 rows:\\n{orders.tail\(3\)}'\)
print\(f'\\nNull counts:\\n{orders.isnull\(\).sum\(\)}'\)
")

Bash(python - <<'EOF'
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.read_excel\("3000.xlsx"\)

print\("=" * 60\)
print\("COLUMN NAMES"\)
print\("=" * 60\)
for i, col in enumerate\(df.columns\):
    print\(f"  [{i}] {repr\(col\)}"\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 60\)
print\(f"ROW COUNT: {len\(df\)}"\)
print\("=" * 60\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 60\)
print\("FIRST 10 ROWS"\)
print\("=" * 60\)
pd.set_option\('display.max_columns', None\)
pd.set_option\('display.width', 200\)
pd.set_option\('display.max_colwidth', 50\)
print\(df.head\(10\).to_string\(\)\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 60\)
print\("NULL COUNTS PER COLUMN"\)
print\("=" * 60\)
null_counts = df.isnull\(\).sum\(\)
for col, count in null_counts.items\(\):
    print\(f"  {repr\(col\)}: {count}"\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 60\)
print\("DATA TYPES PER COLUMN"\)
print\("=" * 60\)
for col, dtype in df.dtypes.items\(\):
    print\(f"  {repr\(col\)}: {dtype}"\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 60\)
print\("SAMPLE VALUES PER COLUMN"\)
print\("=" * 60\)
for col in df.columns:
    unique_vals = df[col].dropna\(\).unique\(\)
    print\(f"\\n  Column: {repr\(col\)}"\)
    if len\(unique_vals\) < 20:
        print\(f"  Unique values \({len\(unique_vals\)}\): {list\(unique_vals\)}"\)
    else:
        print\(f"  Total unique: {len\(unique_vals\)} — First 10: {list\(unique_vals[:10]\)}"\)

EOF)

Bash(python -c "
import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.read_excel\('C:/Users/hesam/project/3000.xlsx'\)

print\('=' * 60\)
print\('COLUMN NAMES'\)
print\('=' * 60\)
for i, col in enumerate\(df.columns\):
    print\(f'  [{i}] {repr\(col\)}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=' * 60\)
print\(f'ROW COUNT: {len\(df\)}'\)
print\('=' * 60\)

print\(\)
print\('=' * 60\)
print\('FIRST 10 ROWS'\)
print\('=' * 60\)
pd.set_option\('display.max_columns', None\)
pd.set_option\('display.width', 200\)
pd.set_option\('display.max_colwidth', 50\)
print\(df.head\(10\).to_string\(\)\)

print\(\)
print\('=' * 60\)
print\('NULL COUNTS PER COLUMN'\)
print\('=' * 60\)
null_counts = df.isnull\(\).sum\(\)
for col, count in null_counts.items\(\):
    print\(f'  {repr\(col\)}: {count}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=' * 60\)
print\('DATA TYPES PER COLUMN'\)
print\('=' * 60\)
for col, dtype in df.dtypes.items\(\):
    print\(f'  {repr\(col\)}: {dtype}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=' * 60\)
print\('SAMPLE VALUES PER COLUMN'\)
print\('=' * 60\)
for col in df.columns:
    unique_vals = df[col].dropna\(\).unique\(\)
    print\(f'  Column: {repr\(col\)}'\)
    if len\(unique_vals\) < 20:
        print\(f'  Unique values \({len\(unique_vals\)}\): {list\(unique_vals\)}'\)
    else:
        print\(f'  Total unique: {len\(unique_vals\)} -- First 10: {list\(unique_vals[:10]\)}'\)
    print\(\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import pdfplumber, re, sys
sys.stderr = open\('nul','w'\)

all_text = []
with pdfplumber.open\('C:/Users/hesam/project/fy23-annual-report.pdf'\) as pdf:
    for page in pdf.pages:
        text = page.extract_text\(\)
        if text:
            all_text.append\(text\)

full_text = ' '.join\(all_text\)
tokens = re.findall\(r'[a-zA-Z]{3,}', full_text.lower\(\)\)
print\('Total chars:', len\(full_text\)\)
print\('Total tokens:', len\(tokens\)\)
print\('Sample tokens:', tokens[500:520]\)
" 2>nul)
